name: Rhubarb Pork Chop Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Sliced fresh or frozen rhubarb, 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown pork chops in oil and season with salt and pepper. Remove to a warm platter.
2. Mix 1/4 cup pan drippings with bread crumbs. Reserve 1/2 cup; sprinkle remaining crumbs into a 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
3. Combine rhubarb, sugar, flour, and cinnamon; spoon half over the bread crumbs.
4. Arrange pork chops on top. Spoon remaining rhubarb mixture over chops.
5. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes.
6. Remove foil. Sprinkle with reserved bread crumbs. Bake 10-15 minutes longer or until chops are done.
